search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com only. Prioritized concrete guide pages over generic home pages. No public-claim readiness marked.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Main hero hub with a long roster, faction filters, levels, and hero equipment sections; good for hero discovery and cross-checking character names.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster, faction grouping, and equipment references.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page with category tabs and level-by-level badge costs; useful for locating research names and checking upgrade costs.
results.primary_user_job: Find research categories and badge cost tables.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English homepage linking to heroes, buildings, alliances, and strategy pages; useful as a navigation hub for topic discovery.
results.primary_user_job: Find where major guide sections live.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Focused on Last Z Fandom pages matching research, hero, and event timing. Kept only same-domain wiki leads. No public-claim-ready flags were set.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycle includes an Age of Science theme for technology research, plus a Hero Initiative theme tied to hero XP, fragments, and recruitment tickets.
results.primary_user_job: Find event tasks and scoring tied to research or heroes
claims_to_verify: Exact point rules for research and hero actions
Rewards for each rank or chest tier

results.title: Apocalypse Time | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Defines the server clock used for daily reset and event timing, useful for aligning research event windows.
results.primary_user_job: Determine when daily events and resets occur

results.title: Laboratory | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Explains the building used to research technologies and its unlock rules.

search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to www.packsify.com. No matching pages were found for the exact query string within the allowed domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No index results found for the approved domain and query.

search_records.search_notes: Search returned multiple Last Z-specific pages on the allowed domain. Prioritized concrete guide pages over generic/brand pages. All selected results are exact page URLs on mmediamreza.com and fit discovery/cross-validation use.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Detailed guide for Shooter Camp upgrades, training cap, speed, and power table; good for unit-building progression.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Shooter unit training and upgrade priorities.

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide focused on Assaulter Camp training, cap, speed bonuses, and progression milestones; useful for troop training cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Assaulter unit training and upgrade priorities.

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Research-building guide covering technologies and second lab unlock; useful for progression dependency checks.
results.primary_user_job: Track research unlocks and tech dependencies.
